channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2028 Democratic hopefuls criticized for webinars teaching undocumented immigrants to resist ICE
item.description: Senator Markwayne Mullin criticizes Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Gavin Newsom for hosting webinars that he says provide resources to help undocumented immigrants defy ICE.

item.title: California scrutinizes billionaire residency claims
item.description: The California Franchise Tax Board is preparing to audit some of the state's wealthiest former residents to verify whether they legitimately established...

item.title: The $225 million school fraud scandal: fake students, bribes, and designer bags
'A big effing deal': Graham's final mission advances after his death
item.description: Hours before Lindsey Graham's death, the White House backed his Russia sanctions package. Now a bipartisan Senate group has unveiled the sweeping bill...
